evals.name: standard-daily-audit
evals.prompt: It's the start of the day for the quarterly review. Run the daily wiki audit and sync the dashboard. The current Notion state is in the attached standard_run.json (treat it as the live source of truth). Give me the per-wiki summary and the updated dashboard numbers.
evals.expected_output: Company -> 4/4 = 100% (was 95%), Marketing -> 2/5 = 40% (was 40%), Sales -> 3/3 = 100% (was 88%). Summary table with before/after and a headline noting Company and Sales hit 100%, Marketing flat. Unverified pages for Marketing named (Campaign plan, Press kit, SEO playbook).

evals.name: unreadable-wiki-no-clobber
evals.prompt: Refresh the wiki dashboard from the attached unreadable_wiki.json. Update every row you can and tell me where things stand.
evals.expected_output: Company -> 3/3 = 100%. Product row is SKIPPED and reported as inaccessible; its existing 25/22/88 values are NOT overwritten with zeros. Headline flags Product as unreadable/skipped.

evals.name: edge-cases-counting
evals.prompt: Run the audit on the attached edge_cases.json and update the dashboard. Walk me through how each wiki came out.
evals.expected_output: Design -> 0 pages, flagged empty, 0%. Eng -> 5 live pages (archived 'Archived spec' excluded), 2 verified (Style guide, Deploy runbook); 'On-call' expires exactly at now so counts as expired; -> 40% (was 50%).
